test.observation: All tests passed. Some tests skipped due to missing BOT_TOKEN (expected). Config conversion warnings observed during test execution (related to VAL-HIGH-012 fix for type conversion error handling)

typecheck.observation: Build succeeded for all platforms (windows/amd64, linux/arm64, darwin/arm64, darwin/amd64, windows/arm64, linux/amd64). Docker image build skipped due to no Docker daemon (expected in this environment)

lint.observation: Lint passed. Some 'dupl' warnings about duplicate code in db.go and greetings_db.go - these are existing patterns and acceptable (welcome/goodbye functions have similar structure by design)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The 'bugfix-worker' skill referenced in mission documentation may not exist or may need to be auto-generated. Workers attempted to invoke it but it was not available. Consider either: 1) Creating the skill if it should exist, 2) Updating mission docs to reference existing skill names, or 3) Using a more generic worker skill like 'worker'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-connections-stale-data reported: 'The worker attempted to invoke a bugfix-worker skill that doesn't exist (skill invocation failed silently). This suggests the mission-worker-base skill or documentation may need updating.'

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate code warnings in greetings_db.go between welcome and goodbye setter functions
Duplicate code warnings in db.go between UpdateRecordWithContext and UpdateRecordWithZeroValuesWithContext
